Here is the list of signs and their scores at Line:
1. Aries - 8/10 - Natural leaders with strong initiative, but sometimes impulsive.
2. Taurus - 6/10 - Practical and dependable, but can be stubborn and resistant to change.
3. Gemini - 9/10 - Quick-witted and adaptable, but can be scattered and forgetful.
4. Cancer - 7/10 - Emotionally sensitive and caring, but can be moody and overly attached.
5. Leo - 8/10 - Confident and charismatic, but can be prideful and dominating.
6. Virgo - 9/10 - Analytical and hardworking, but can be perfectionistic and critical.
7. Libra - 8/10 - Diplomatic and social, but can be indecisive and people-pleasing.
8. Scorpio - 9/10 - Passionate and perceptive, but can be intense and controlling.
9. Sagittarius - 8/10 - Adventurous and optimistic, but can be blunt and tactless.
10. Capricorn - 7/10 - Disciplined and responsible, but can be rigid and unforgiving.
11. Aquarius - 8/10 - Humanitarian and independent, but can be aloof and unpredictable.
12. Pisces - 6/10 - Empathetic and imaginative, but can be dreamy and unrealistic.
Note: The scores are subjective and based on general interpretations of each sign's characteristics.
